title: Expanded Storage
description: Adds chests and other containers that store more
body:
> **ⓘ Info**
> 
> **Please note that this project is not really active any more.**
> 
> **I'd highly recommend using other storage mods such as [Arke](https://modrinth.com/mod/arke) for a vanilla+ feel or [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) for a more lightly modded experience.**
> 
> **The current plan is to maintain Expanded Storage until 27.1 in which case hopefully Arke: Iren will be usable and a smooth migration is possible.**

---

For recipes please use a recipe viewer mod like [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei).

### Tiers
- Wooden: can store 27 stacks, has the following cosmetic themes:
  - Wooden
  - Pumpkin
  - Present
  - Bamboo
  - Moss
- Copper: can store 45 stacks, just under 2 chests worth.
- Iron: can store 54 stacks, 2 chests worth.
- Golden: is liked by piglins and can store 81 stacks, 3 chests worth.
- Diamond: can store 108 stacks, 4 chests worth.
- Obsidian: is blast proof and can store 108 stacks, 4 chests worth.
- Netherite: is fire-resistant, blast proof, and can store 135 stacks, 5 chests worth.

### Chests
![Image shows the following chests from left to right: wooden, pumpkin, present, bamboo, moss, iron, golden, diamond, metallic obsidian, and netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/9e12f65358d96dbd857ec3dc49f49564d29b407c.png)
---
Similar to vanilla chests but they can merge along any axis

### Classic Chests
![Image shows the following classic chests from left to right: wooden, iron, golden, diamond, metallic obsidian, and netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/4a7bb169a728c04c094e0a2a45cad55e1327a0c5.png)
---
Similar to chests but occupy the whole block space, they don't have any opening animation and should impact fps less.

### Barrels
![Image shows the following barrels from left to right: copper, iron, golden, diamond, obsidian, and netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/48468905bbac28551c7ec9e40b9f37cf1644e7d4.png)
---
Exactly like vanilla barrels but with more inventory space.

### Mini Storage
![Image shows the following mini chests from left to right: vanilla wooden, expanded storage wooden, pumpkin, single present, large present, tall present, long present, lavender, and pink amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/c9a4cb40220d4dff0cae9cc378109d67c730a52c.png)
![Image shows the following mini chests from left to right: iron, golden, diamond, obsidian, and netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/0f336bc70da1614f992275106c9398e3d956f041.png)
![Image shows the following mini barrels from left to right: regular, copper, iron, golden, diamond, obsidian, and netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/3691e3724f441a385e9a584d2c671cb8f6699811.png)
---
<!-- redo barrels image too? -->
Mini storage blocks can only hold 1 stack and are ideal for gifting things to other players :D

Note: not all styles are craft-able and will need a Storage Mutator renamed to **Sparrow** to unlock.

### Tools
![Image shows a storage mutator on the left side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/93aa378d78affb4c1285753d78b1b12c5d266af4.png)
---
The storage mutator is a tool to configure chest and other storage containers in world.

It currently consists of 4 modes, note not all modes are applicable to all storage types:
- Merge: Allows merging of two adjacent chests or old chests into a double chest.
- Split: Allows splitting a double chest into two single chests.
- Rotate: Allows rotating any storage container, note chests are limited to horizontal rotations.
- Swap theme: Allows changing the theme of the storage container, this only works for themes in the same tier.

### Conversion Kits
![Image shows the following conversion kits from left to right: wooden to copper, copper to iron, iron to golden, golden to diamond, diamond to obsidian, and obsidian to netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToIgxPfF/images/356cba77d2bf17389e7442f382ce2fb76edc0eb0.png)
---
Conversion kits can be used to convert blocks and entities already placed in world to a different tier.

### Contributors
**Latest releases:**
- Mod code and texture assets - Quinn Meadows & Ellie Meadows
- Mod icon and other item / block renders - [Isometric Renderers mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders)
- Pumpkin chest textures - Yoghurt4C, these textures, for the regular chest only, are public domain.
- Christmas chest textures - Yoghurt4C, these textures, for the regular chest only, are public domain.
- Bamboo chest textures - Yoghurt4C
- Moss chest textures - ClockworkVulpine
- Russian translations - Romz24
- French translations - Wombhy
- Dutch translations - ClockworkVulpine
- Italian translations - [Maicol](https://gitlab.com/maicol07)
- Brazilian translations - [SeriousFreezing](https://github.com/seriousfreezing)

**Older releases:**
- Mod icon - Hambaka
- French translations - Yanis48
- Simplified Chinese translations - XuyuEre, updated later by qsefthuopq.
- Traditional Chinese translations - Shedaniel
- Spanish translations - jackcamilo406
- Brazilian Portuguese translations - joaoh1
- Settings button texture - sheepguard
- Russian translations - Miros77
